title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you swap Ollama models into any LangChain chain or agent.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama: multi-model convos, PDF uploads, RAG, admin panel, dark mode.

title: ollama-cli
summary: TUI wrapper written in Go that adds interactive model search, conversation history, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation stack using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Lightweight agent orchestrator on top of Ollama: plan, delegate, execute, and retry tasks autonomously.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Dify’s built-in Ollama provider lets you plug local models into prompt IDE, RAG pipelines, and AI plugins.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, and chat with code using any Ollama model without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components for pipelines.

title: ollama-grpc
summary: Thin gRPC proxy in front of Ollama’s REST API for high-throughput serving with connection pooling.

title: ollama-cdktf
summary: CDKTF example that spins up an Azure VM with GPU and Ollama pre-installed via cloud-init.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate exposing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API with Serde models.

title: ollama-crewai
summary: CrewAI tool adapter allowing any Ollama model to act as a role-based agent in multi-agent crews.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that listens for @ mentions and replies using an Ollama backend.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama’s REST and streaming endpoints with GenServer-backed clients.
